CONTENT.Career: On 20 August 2017, Rexhbeçaj signed a professional contract with Bundesliga side VfL Wolfsburg. On 28 January 2018, he made his debut in a 1–0 away win against Hannover 96 after coming on as a substitute at 84th minute in place of Daniel Didavi.In January 2020, it was announced that Rexhbeçaj would be loaned to 1. FC Köln until June 2021. The move included an option to remain permanently at the club.On 2 August 2021 Rexhbeçaj was loaned to VfL Bochum for the 2021–22 season.On 27 July 2022, Rexhbeçaj signed a four-year contract with Augsburg.
CONTENT.Personal life: Rexhbeçaj was born in the village of Gjonaj and is of Kosovo Albanian descent. His family fled from Kosovo during the Kosovo War and settled in Brandenburg.
CONTENT.External links: Elvis Rexhbeçaj at SoccerwayElvis Rexhbeçaj at DFB (also available in German)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 13 January 2024Notes

SUMMARY: Elvis Rexhbeçaj (born 1 November 1997) is a Kosovar professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club Augsburg.
